headline: Hormel Foods Unveils Top 5 Pizza Trends for 2026: Calabrian Chili, Brisket, and Global Fusion Lead the Menu
summary: As the global pizza community prepares to descend on Las Vegas for the International Pizza Expo ("Pizza Expo"), Hormel Foods (NYSE: HRL), a global branded food company and a leader in the pizza toppings category, is unveiling the five dominant menu items pizza enthusiasts will be seeking this year.

headline: Q4 Earnings Outperformers: Hormel Foods (NYSE:HRL) And The Rest Of The Shelf-Stable Food Stocks
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who not so much). Let’s take a look at how shelf-stable food stocks fared in Q4, starting with Hormel Foods (NYSE:HRL).

headline: Best Dividend Kings: March 2026
summary: The Dividend Kings outperformed SPY year-to-date, up 2.06% versus SPY's 3.06% loss, despite a March pullback. Check out the list here.
